Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Silver Light]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Silver Light is a power of wisdom in Elysian legend and tradition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Silver Light allows a user to see through skin and into the marrow of a human body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — The Silver Light said nothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Silver Light is a power Alin possesses that he can cast to see inside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Alin can command Silver Light to spread through the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Alin can use Silver Light as a screen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Silver Light whispers to Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Silver Light can provide protection through a bond.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Alin can use Silver Light to search the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — The Silver Light is a voice that radiates sadness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The Silver Light warned Alin that people were scrambling out of the Naraka Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Silver Light alerted Alin to something below.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin can call Silver Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Alin has Silver Light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Silver Light points out that killing Zakareth does not mean things were good.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
